---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report an issue with the documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation, triage
assignees: Ksander215
---

## Documentation Issue
A clear description of what's wrong or missing in the documentation.

## Location
- **Page**: [e.g. docs/modules/INT-004.md]
- **Section**: [e.g. Risk Assessment Formula]

## Current Content
What the documentation currently says (if applicable).

## Suggested Fix
What the documentation should say instead.

## Additional Context
Any references to source code or ADRs that support the fix.
